security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: local: blob: data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.tailwindcss.com https://fonts.googleapis.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.tailwindcss.com https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com
